zh.Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾吉爾莫拉可
zh.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm是John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm的兒子，於1523年5月31日出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾吉爾莫拉可。他於1577年與Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於從大約1584年到1590年。

zh-hans.Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾吉爾莫拉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm是John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm的儿子，于1523年5月31日出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾吉爾莫拉可。他于1577年与Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于从大约1584年到1590年。

nameMeanings.name: Chisholm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Chisholme near Hawick in southern Scotland, which derives its name from Old English c̄se, cēse ‘cheese’ (from Latin caseus) + holm ‘piece of dry land in a fen’ and refers to a waterside meadow good for dairy farming and hence for producing cheeses. In the 14th century members of this family migrated to the Highlands, settling in Strathglass, where their name was Gaelicized as Siosal.

variants.name: Chisom
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Yorkshire but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisam
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Cumbria but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisum
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chislom
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm   or   Chisolm  .

variants.name: Chezem
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm  . Compare   Chisum  .

en.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm was born on 31 May 1523, in Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland as the son of John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm. He married Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm in 1577, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died from about 1584 to 1590.

fr.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm est né le 31 mai 1523, à Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Écosse, fils de John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm. Il a épousé Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm en 1577, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé du environ 1584 au 1590.

de.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm wurde am 31. Mai 1523 in Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland, als Sohn von John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm geboren. Er hat 1577 in Scotland Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb von um 1584 bis 1590.

it.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm è nato il il 31 maggio 1523 nel Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland come figlio di John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm. Lui sposato Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm nel 1577, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì da circa 1584 a 1590.

ja.Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland: スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアキルモーアック
ja.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholmは1523年5月31日にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアキルモーアックでJohn Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholmの息子として生まれた。1577年にスコットランドでJanet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はから約1584年まで1590年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm(은)는 1523년 5월 31일 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 킬모라c크에서 John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1577년 스컷랜드에서 Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1584년 부터 1590년 까지 사망했다.

lv.31 May 1523–from about 1584 to 1590: 1523. gada 31. maijs–no ap 1584. gada līdz 1590. gadam

pt.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm nasceu em 31 de maio de 1523, em Kilmorack, Inverness-shire, Scotland filho de John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm. Ele casou-se com Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm em 1577, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu de aproximadamente 1584 a 1590.

ru.lifeSummary: Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar, 14th of Chisholm родился 31 мая 1523 г. в местности килморакк, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. Его отца звали John Mac Wiland Chisholm of Knockfin, Comar Mor - 13th of Chisholm. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm в 1577 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер с около 1584 по 1590.

Se casó con Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm en 1577, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió desde aproximadamente 1584 hasta 1590.
